traits.name: Skills requiring dexterity
traits.description: High manual dexterity — used by Morphus characteristics and attribute penalties that target dexterity-dependent skills.

traits.name: Skills requiring a light touch
traits.description: Fine manipulation and careful handling — separate book list from dexterity skills.

traits.name: Skills related to electrical work
traits.description: Electronics, electrical repair, computers, and related technical skills (see skills_related_to_electrical.txt).

traits.name: Skills related to repair
traits.description: General repair, jury-rig, and maintenance skills (see skills_related_to_repair.txt).

traits.name: Skills related to mechanics
traits.description: Mechanical engineering, vehicle/aircraft mechanics, and related trade skills (see skills_related_to_mechanics.txt).

traits.name: Skills requiring timing
traits.description: Demolitions, mathematics, and other skills where precise timing matters (see skills_requiring_timing.txt). Performance skills use related_to_performance instead.

traits.name: Skills related to performance
traits.description: Dance, singing, public speaking, and other appearance or entertainment skills (see skills_related_to_performance.txt). Used by Morphus penalties such as “-10% on skill performance.”

traits.name: Skills requiring focus
traits.description: Skills that demand sustained concentration or mental focus (see skills_requiring_focus.txt).

traits.name: Work / education related skills
traits.description: College, trade, and vocational P.C.C. core picks (Nightbane Psychic P.C.C. — see skills_work_education_related.txt). Includes computer skills except Hacking; Radio: Basic and T.V./Video.

membershipNotes.basicElectronics: Referenced in prerequisites and trait lists; add catalog row or alias when ingested.
membershipNotes.performance: Listed in skills_related_to_performance.txt; no Nightbane catalog row (intentionally omitted). Morphus “skill performance” penalties target related_to_performance.
membershipNotes.primaryPpPenalties: Optional low facade P.P. penalties map to requires_dexterity / requires_light_touch via primaryPpSkillTraitPenalties.ts (ported from v0 highManualDexterity / otherManualDexterity).
